Uplink

Computer-Assisted Reporting Newsletter, 1990–2007

Browse Topics Search

For more information:

September 2000
Technology

A reference guide providing resources for geographic data visualization and mapping tools, including links to mapping software, GIS platforms, and computer-assisted reporting institutions, with an example map showing medal distribution across municipalities.

For more information:

MAPS: www.mapping.dk/

ArcView: www.esri.com

Mapinfo: www.mapinfo.com

Danish Institute for Computer-assisted Reporting (DICAR) www.dicar.org

The map to the right, created by Dick van Eijk, shows the absolute number of higher medals per municipality.
